title: sesamum schinzianum
intro: Sesamum schinzianum, also known as the whiteflower sesame, is a plant species within the sesame family. It is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Sesamum schinzianum can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
